title: ReachSphere
description: ReachSphere is a resource pack which displays the player's attack range in Survival mode, using core shaders in vanilla minecraft.
body:
# ReachSphere
ReachSphere is a resource pack which displays the player's attack range in Survival mode, using core shaders in vanilla minecraft.

# Notes
ReachSphere is a resource pack which uses core shaders, not a shader pack.

<font color="red">I am not responsible if you are banned from the server for using this.</font>

# Known issues
Partially incompatible with Sodium.
